concepts.finding: Fast R-CNN enables single-stage training of detection networks by using RoI pooling to share computation across region proposals, achieving 9x faster training than R-CNN and 213x faster inference.
concepts.implication: Computation sharing (RoI pooling) across candidates dramatically improves efficiency. For search, this suggests pooling strategies to reuse computation across similar query or document candidates.
concepts.open_question: What is the search-equivalent of RoI pooling for sharing computation across multiple query interpretations?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: A computation-sharing approach for evaluating multiple query interpretations simultaneously will reduce total inference cost by 5x.
